session.tool_result:

session.assistant:
ruff failed: 1 issue found
**File:** /home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/wt/create_cmd.py
**Issue:** - Line 173: E501 - Line too long (107 > 100 characters) - The line contains a call to `ensure_unique_worktree_name_with_date()` that exceeds the 100-character limit
The problematic line is: ```python name = ensure_unique_worktree_name_with_date(name, repo.worktrees_dir, ctx.git, now=ctx.time.now()) ```
This line needs to be reformatted to fit within the 100-character limit, likely by breaking it across multiple lines.
